gsm, computes, score s_b = ∇_z log p(z_b) for each z_b
gsm, computes, intermediate quantity β_b = σ_t s_b - μ_t + z_b
gsm, solves, nonlinear equation (1+γ) = s_b^t σ_t s_b + [(μ_t - z_b)^t s_b]^2 for γ > 0
gsm, computes, updated mean component μ_b = [i - (μ_t - z_b) s_b^t / (1+γ) + (μ_t - z_b)^t s_b] β_b
gsm, computes, updated covariance component σ_b = (μ_t - z_b)(μ_t - z_b)^t - (μ_b - z_b)(μ_b - z_b)^t
gsm, updates, variational mean μ_{t+1} = μ_t + (1/b) ∑_{b=1}^b μ_b
gsm, updates, variational covariance σ_{t+1} = σ_t + (1/b) ∑_{b=1}^b σ_b
